name: DIY Painting Project Consultation — Painting Lab
description: The consultation with us will make your next painting job a better and more successful experience, giving you peace of mind whether you're hiring a contractor or doing it yourself.

You will receive detailed instructions on how to tackle the job at each stage of the project. Following our 15-minute consultation, we'll gather all the essential information and craft a tailored PDF guide for you. This guide will walk you through every necessary step to ensure your painting project is done correctly and efficiently. Say goodbye to the worry of using the wrong materials or applying them in the incorrect order on unsuitable surfaces.

We understand how overwhelming the details can be, which is why we're offering our professional advice. This way, you can avoid costly mistakes that might require hiring a professional painter to rectify. Investing in this guide is a small price to pay for the peace of mind and savings it brings, compared to the potential expense and hassle of correcting errors. Let us help you get it right the first time and make your DIY painting project a resounding success. Book your consultation today.

--- How to Choose the Right Colours for Your Home — Painting Lab ---
Skip to Content Open Menu Close Menu Home Contact Commercial Projects 0 0 Home Contact Commercial Projects 0 0 Open Menu Close Menu Home Contact Commercial Projects How to Choose the Right Colours for Your Home 6 Aug Written By R3NO Expert Paint Tips from Painting Lab One of the most exciting yet challenging parts of any painting project is choosing the right colours for your home.

Extending the Life of Your Exterior The right paint job doesn’t just make your home look better—it also prolongs the life of your exterior materials. Whether it’s timber, brick, or render, our team knows how to prepare and paint each surface for maximum longevity. Painting your exterior is like giving your home a new layer of protection. Quality Inspection After Completion At Painting Lab, we ensure every exterior repaint is finished to the highest standard.

A modern home might benefit from bold, clean colours, while a heritage home may look stunning in more classic, neutral tones. It’s essential to think about the architectural features you want to highlight and how your colour choices can enhance them. Take Natural Light Into Account Lighting can make or break a colour.

Addressing Underlying Issues When you repaint your home’s exterior, you often discover hidden problems such as cracks or water damage that might have gone unnoticed. At Painting Lab, we thoroughly inspect your home’s exterior before starting any work. This allows us to repair these issues before they become bigger problems, ensuring your home remains in top condition for years to come.

At Painting Lab, we believe in delivering quality results and a seamless customer experience from start to finish. For enquiries, reach out to us at kris@paintinglab. com. au or visit www. paintinglab. com. au for more information.

Increasing Property Value A well-executed exterior paint job does more than beautify your home—it can also increase its market value. Potential buyers are more likely to be attracted to a home with a fresh, updated look. Real estate experts agree that a quality exterior repaint can deliver a high return on investment. In areas like Sydney’s Northern Beaches or the Gold Coast, where competition is fierce, this small investment can make a big difference.

Kris Tomsic, Managing Director at Painting Lab, shares his top tips on choosing colours that will make your home shine. Consider Your Home’s Architecture The style and design of your home play a significant role in determining which colours will look best.

Repainting is not just about aesthetics—it’s a crucial investment that helps protect your property, explains Kris Tomsic, Managing Director at Painting Lab. Unfortunately, many homeowners overlook the importance of a professional exterior paint job, thinking it’s purely cosmetic. But a proper repaint can save you money in the long run by preventing damage and increasing your home’s value. Protection from the Elements Your home’s exterior is the first line of defense against the weather.

If your home’s exterior looks run-down, it can leave a negative impression on guests or potential buyers. A professional repaint can instantly elevate your home’s appearance, making it look modern, clean, and well-maintained. Whether you’re preparing to sell or just want to enjoy a refreshed exterior, a new coat of paint is one of the easiest ways to enhance curb appeal.

Addressing Underlying Issues When you repaint your home’s exterior, you often discover hidden problems such as cracks or water damage that might have gone unnoticed. At Painting Lab, we thoroughly inspect your home’s exterior before starting any work. This allows us to repair these issues before they become bigger problems, ensuring your home remains in top condition for years to come.

Increasing Property Value A well-executed exterior paint job does more than beautify your home—it can also increase its market value. Potential buyers are more likely to be attracted to a home with a fresh, updated look. Real estate experts agree that a quality exterior repaint can deliver a high return on investment. In areas like Sydney’s Northern Beaches or the Gold Coast, where competition is fierce, this small investment can make a big difference.

For example, homes near the coast, like those in Sydney’s Northern Beaches or the Gold Coast, often look best with softer, neutral tones that blend seamlessly with the natural landscape. At Painting Lab, we can guide you on the best options to ensure your home complements its environment. Test Colours Before You Commit Before painting an entire room or the exterior of your house, it’s always a good idea to test a sample on the wall.

Skip to Content Open Menu Close Menu Home Contact Commercial Projects 0 0 Home Contact Commercial Projects 0 0 Open Menu Close Menu Home Contact Commercial Projects Repainting Your House To Increase Profit 5 Aug Written By R3NO The exterior of your home takes a beating from the elements every day, and over time, it can start to look worn out.

If your home’s exterior looks run-down, it can leave a negative impression on guests or potential buyers. A professional repaint can instantly elevate your home’s appearance, making it look modern, clean, and well-maintained. Whether you’re preparing to sell or just want to enjoy a refreshed exterior, a new coat of paint is one of the easiest ways to enhance curb appeal.

Repainting is not just about aesthetics—it’s a crucial investment that helps protect your property, explains Kris Tomsic, Managing Director at Painting Lab. Unfortunately, many homeowners overlook the importance of a professional exterior paint job, thinking it’s purely cosmetic. But a proper repaint can save you money in the long run by preventing damage and increasing your home’s value. Protection from the Elements Your home’s exterior is the first line of defense against the weather.

Rooms with plenty of natural light tend to look best with cool tones like whites, blues, or greys, while darker rooms may benefit from warmer shades like beige, soft yellows, or earthy tones. Test your chosen colours at different times of day to see how they look under natural and artificial light. Create Harmony with Your Surroundings When choosing exterior paint colours, it’s important to consider your surroundings.

Paint can look different in large areas compared to a small swatch.
